2605.30003.title: Discovering Cooperative Pipelines: Autoresearch for Sequential Social Dilemmas
2605.30003.paper_summary: We study two-level autoresearch for cooperation: an outer-loop AI agent autonomously redesigns the inner-loop pipeline of an LLM policy-synthesis system for multi-agent Sequential Social Dilemmas (SSDs). A researcher agent $\mathcal{R}$ (run as a coding agent) reads the inner-loop source code, edits system prompts, feedback functions, helper libraries, and iteration logic, runs evaluations, and decides what to keep, following the autoresearch paradigm. Across two games (Cleanup and Gathering), two policy-synthesizer LLMs, and two welfare objectives (utilitarian efficiency and Rawlsian maximin), the researcher reliably exceeds hand-designed baselines, sharply tightens run-to-run variance, and outperforms prompt-only optimization. The discovered pipelines are objective-dependent: only under maximin does the researcher inject an explicit fairness mechanism into synthesizer pipelines, a class of mechanism that is absent from its own objective-agnostic system prompt and from every efficiency-optimized pipeline. This supports an information-design reading in which the researcher chooses what to reveal to the boundedly rational synthesizer as a function of the welfare objective. Code at https://github.com/vicgalle/autoresearch-social-dilemmas.
2605.30003.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究合作的兩層自動研究：一個外部循環的 AI 代理自動重新設計多代理序列社會困境 (SSD) 的 LLM 策略合成系統的內部循環管道。研究者代理 $\mathcal{R}$（作為編碼代理運行）閱讀內部循環源代碼，編輯系統提示、反饋函數、輔助庫和迭代邏輯，運行評估，並決定保留哪些內容，遵循自動研究範式。在兩個遊戲（清理和收集）、兩個政策合成 LLM 和兩個福利目標（功利效率和羅爾斯最大化）中，研究者可靠地超越手動設計的基準，顯著縮小每次運行的變異性，並優於僅基於提示的優化。所發現的管道是依賴於目標的：只有在最大化的情況下，研究者才會將明確的公平機制注入合成器管道，這類機制在其自身的無目標系統提示和每個效率優化的管道中都是缺失的。這支持了一種信息設計的解讀，其中研究者根據福利目標選擇向有限理性的合成器揭示什麼。代碼位於 https://github.com/vicgalle/autoresearch-social-dilemmas。
2605.30003.author: Víctor Gallego et.al.
